raw: Sarah Klein at Acme Robotics in Boston requested medical leave after a panic disorder diagnosis. Her manager Alex put her on a PIP two weeks later.
My landlord Mark Benson at 45 Winter Street in Cambridge says he will keep my security deposit because of damage from March 7.
John Smith lives at 14 Beacon Street and was prescribed sertraline by Dr. Rosen after panic attacks began in April.
Maya Patel, a Northeastern student in CS 3500, says Professor Lee accused her of cheating on Project 4.
Daniel Ortiz told HR that his manager Priya at Northstar Labs denied leave after his cancer treatment schedule changed.
A contractor named Elena Ruiz says Apex Systems has not paid invoice 1042 after work at the Austin office.
Patient Liam Chen emailed nurse Maria about lithium side effects after a dose change on May 12.
Avery Johnson from Lincoln School says Mr. Patel accused them of plagiarism in English 201.
Email me at taylor@example.com about the confidential Atlas launch plan in Seattle next Tuesday.
Nina Brooks at Orion Company reported retaliation concerns after requesting accommodations for depression.
